title: Parameterized Tests in JUnit 5
summary: At JavaLand 2017, I spent 15 minutes exploring JUnit 5's (then) brand-new parameterized test feature in a NightHacking session
content:
At JavaLand 2017, I spent 15 minutes exploring JUnit 5's (then) brand-new parameterized test feature in a NightHacking session

Thanks Sebastian (Daschner) for inviting me to this session, exploring things live on camera is fun. (No, really!)

Watch the video.
